task_completion.description: Navigate to the Edit Product page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the WooCommerce 'Edit Product' page with the title 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' in the main title field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Regular Price is set to 79.99
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Product data' meta box under the 'General' tab, the 'Regular price ($)' input field contains the value '79.99'.
In the 'Product data' meta box under the 'General' tab, the 'Sale price ($)' input field contains the value '49.99'.

task_completion.description: Reveal the sale schedule date fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sale price dates' fields ('From…' and 'To…') are visible directly below the Sale price input field.

task_completion.description: Set the sale start date to 2025-07-01
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'From…' date input field contains '2025-07-01' (or July 1, 2025 depending on local date format rendering in the input).

task_completion.description: Set the sale end date to 2025-07-07
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To…' date input field contains '2025-07-07' (or July 7, 2025 depending on local date format rendering in the input).

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the product
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product updated.' success message is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Update' button in the Publish meta box is shown being clicked after all fields are filled.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the WooCommerce admin panel, not a terminal window using WP-CLI or cURL commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the correct form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Prices and dates are typed into the actual WooCommerce 'Product data' input boxes, not just written in a text editor or injected via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or values
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console/inspector is not open and being used to alter the DOM to show 'Product updated' or fake the input values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). Expected Regular Price: 79.99. Expected Sale Price: 49.99. Expected Start Date: 2025-07-01. Expected End Date: 2025-07-07. The agent must use the WooCommerce admin GUI to schedule this sale.
